personal.preferred_title: Senior Data Platform Engineer | AWS, Python, SQL & ETL

summary: Senior Data Platform Engineer with 20+ years of enterprise technology experience and deep strengths in Python, SQL, AWS data platforms, ETL/ELT, production analytics, and financial-services infrastructure. Built and operated data pipelines ingesting telemetry from 6,000+ endpoints, designed warehouse/reporting schemas, and supported business-critical production services in regulated banking environments. Strong fit for data platform work requiring cloud infrastructure, data quality, automation, operational monitoring, and close partnership with analytics and data science teams.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Architected and maintained Python/Pandas ETL pipelines ingesting P95 telemetry from 6,000+ endpoints, replacing manual processes with repeatable production data flows for capacity analytics and executive reporting.

Built a hybrid AWS/Oracle data platform using S3 landing zones, AWS Glue ETL, Redshift workloads, and structured warehouse schemas to support forecasting, historical analysis, and operational decision-making.
Designed data quality, reconciliation, and validation patterns for telemetry pipelines, helping stakeholders trust reporting outputs used for capacity planning and risk identification.

Integrated monitoring feeds from BMC TrueSight, CA Wily/APM, and AppDynamics into unified reporting datasets, improving visibility across enterprise infrastructure and application performance signals.
Developed ML forecasting workflows using Prophet and scikit-learn to predict capacity bottlenecks months ahead, pairing data engineering pipelines with analytics and model-ready datasets.

Produced dashboards and operational reports using Streamlit, matplotlib, seaborn, and plotly to surface trends, anomalies, utilization patterns, and platform health indicators for senior stakeholders.

Supported production data services in a regulated financial-services environment, emphasizing reliability, auditability, documentation, incident awareness, and clear communication with business and technical teams.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Managed Dynatrace AppMon and Gomez Synthetic Monitoring for critical web and hospitality systems, using telemetry and synthetic data to identify performance risks and optimization opportunities.
Led the FAST project, mining real-user and synthetic performance metrics to create actionable analytics that engineering teams used to improve high-value digital experiences.
Implemented end-user monitoring and transaction tracing across web and mobile systems, strengthening production observability and operational troubleshooting workflows.
Participated in AWS migration planning and monitoring readiness assessments, connecting application performance engineering with cloud platform transition needs.

experience.title: SME for CA APM / Senior Consultant
bullets: Served as enterprise CA APM SME for a large financial-services client, supporting 50+ Enterprise Managers and thousands of instrumented agents across mission-critical applications.
Built Perl and Korn Shell extraction scripts for automated performance reporting, reducing manual exports and improving repeatability of operational analytics.
Designed dashboards, alert thresholds, management modules, and technical documentation adopted as standards across client environments.
Collaborated with J2EE, WebLogic, and infrastructure teams to diagnose bottlenecks using APM telemetry, transaction traces, and system metrics.

experience.title: Senior Systems & Data Migration Engineer
bullets: Led migration of a high-throughput shopping engine from 200+ MySQL nodes to a 6-node Oracle RAC platform while maintaining strict transaction and query performance requirements.
Built C++/OCCI/OCI validation utilities and automated checks to verify migration correctness across large transaction datasets.
Optimized transaction processing and database access patterns, reducing hardware footprint while preserving sub-second query latency.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

skills.Languages: Python, SQL, PySpark, PL/SQL, Perl, Korn Shell, C++, Java

projects.name: HorizonScale — AI Capacity Forecasting Engine
projects.description: Built a Python/PySpark forecasting and analytics platform that transformed infrastructure telemetry into capacity predictions, operational dashboards, and model-ready datasets for enterprise decision-making.

projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform on AWS
projects.description: Designed a serverless AWS data platform pattern using S3, Glue, Athena, Redshift, and Parquet/Snappy concepts to support scalable ingestion, optimized queries, and analytics-ready data layers.

projects.name: AI-Powered Job Search Pipeline
projects.description: Built an AI-assisted pipeline with semantic duplicate detection, structured JSON artifacts, quality gates, and application tracking, demonstrating production-style automation, schema contracts, and repeatable workflow design.
